goal:
cursor-chat-persistence: Spawn parallel explore subagents to reverse-engineer Cursor chat persistence (SQLite schemas, blob/encryption boundaries, per-workspace chat DBs vs VS Code global storage).

Context:
Live paths: ~/.cursor/chats/<workspaceHash>/<agentFolder>/store.db; ~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb (Linux)
Hypothesis: chats are a middle layer between workspace storage and chat DBs; full-file backup/restore may revive old chats across Cursor versions if ID/hash schemes stay compatible
Repo prior art: src/chat-persistence.ts, src/state-reconciliation.ts, src/transcripts.ts, src/sidebar.ts, src/store-template-hydrate.ts, resources/golden-store-template.sql, tests/chat-persistence.test.ts
Split work: (1) store.db tables, keys, blobs; (2) state.vscdb composer/sidebar keys; (3) workspaceHash <-> workspaceStorage mapping; (4) backup/overwrite/restore risks
Output: merged doc with schemas, join keys, encrypted vs plaintext fields, and safe sync/restore constraints (read-only; no commits)
Constraint: use model composer-2.5-fast for every task (root, subplanners, workers, verifiers).
summary: Reverse-engineer Cursor chat persistence (store.db + state.vscdb) and produce a merged restore/sync constraints doc
acceptanceCriteria: Four explore handoffs cover store.db, state.vscdb, workspace mapping, and restore risks
Merged doc at docs/cursor-chat-persistence.md lists schemas, join keys, encryption boundaries, and safe sync constraints
No extension source files modified (read-only research)

tasks.name: explore-store-db
tasks.scopedGoal: Reverse-engineer Cursor store.db layout: tables, keys, blob structure, versioning, and encryption boundaries. Read bootstrap at .orchestrate/cursor-chat-persistence/bootstrap-reference.md and repo prior art (resources/golden-store-template.sql, src/store-template-hydrate.ts, src/transcripts.ts findStoreDb paths). If live ~/.cursor/chats/**/store.db exists, inspect with sqlite3; otherwise document from repo/fixtures and flag gaps. Write .orchestrate/cursor-chat-persistence/docs/explore-store-db.md with sections: Schema, Keys and blob graph, Join keys to composerId, Encrypted vs plaintext, Unknowns, Sources. Read-only: do not modify src/.
acceptance: explore-store-db.md exists with all required sections
Documents meta/blobs tables and sample key patterns
States encryption status with evidence
tasks.verify: Confirm explore-store-db.md exists, cites repo sources, and covers meta/blobs schema plus encryption boundary.

tasks.name: explore-state-vscdb
tasks.scopedGoal: Reverse-engineer state.vscdb composer/sidebar persistence: ItemTable keys (composer.composerHeaders, composer.composerData, and any conversation-linked keys), global vs workspaceStorage copies, WAL handling. Read bootstrap-reference.md and src/transcripts.ts, src/sync-engine-ops.ts, src/composer-merge.ts, src/chats-manifest.ts. Inspect live globalStorage/state.vscdb or workspaceStorage/*/state.vscdb if present. Write .orchestrate/cursor-chat-persistence/docs/explore-state-vscdb.md with sections: Schema, Composer/sidebar keys, Global vs workspace targets, Join keys, Encrypted vs plaintext, Unknowns, Sources. Read-only.
acceptance: explore-state-vscdb.md documents ItemTable and primary composer keys
Explains global vs workspace stateTarget
Encryption/plaintext boundary documented
tasks.verify: Confirm explore-state-vscdb.md lists composer.composerHeaders/composerData structure and merge semantics.

tasks.name: explore-workspace-mapping
tasks.scopedGoal: Map workspaceKey (~/.cursor/chats/<workspaceKey>/) to workspaceStorage folder ids and project paths. Read bootstrap-reference.md, src/chat-id-sync.ts, src/transcripts.ts (deriveStoreWorkspaceMapping, listChatsWorkspaceKeys), src/sync-engine-ops.ts, src/chats-manifest.ts. If live dirs exist, compare workspace.json in workspaceStorage folders to chats subdirs. Write .orchestrate/cursor-chat-persistence/docs/explore-workspace-mapping.md with sections: Identifier types, Mapping algorithm, Join keys across layers, How Cursor creates keys, Import/sync implications, Unknowns, Sources. Read-only.
acceptance: explore-workspace-mapping.md distinguishes workspaceKey vs workspaceStorageFolderId
Documents composerId/conversation_id join across store.db and state.vscdb
Notes whether workspaceKey equals any hash
tasks.verify: Confirm mapping doc explains chats path layout and validation in chat-id-sync.

tasks.name: explore-restore-risks
tasks.scopedGoal: Document backup/overwrite/restore risks for full-file chat persistence sync across Cursor versions. Read bootstrap-reference.md, src/chat-persistence.ts, src/state-reconciliation.ts, src/rollback.ts, src/store-template-hydrate.ts, tests/chat-persistence.test.ts. Write .orchestrate/cursor-chat-persistence/docs/explore-restore-risks.md with sections: Backup surfaces, Overwrite mechanics, Version/schema drift, File locking and WAL, Safe restore procedure, Unsafe operations, Hypothesis verdict (cross-version full-file restore), Sources. Read-only.
acceptance: explore-restore-risks.md covers pending-state-bundle flow
Lists safe vs unsafe restore constraints
Addresses cross-version compatibility hypothesis
tasks.verify: Confirm restore doc references state-reconciliation pending bundle and rollback backup behavior.

acceptance: Verdict pass or fail with specific gaps

tasks.name: merge-persistence-doc
tasks.scopedGoal: Merge the four explore docs (and verifier notes) into a single authoritative reference at docs/cursor-chat-persistence.md. Include: architecture overview, store.db schema, state.vscdb keys, workspace mapping table, join-key diagram (mermaid ok), encrypted vs plaintext summary, safe sync/restore constraints, open unknowns. Read upstream handoffs pasted in this prompt. Read-only for src/; only write docs/cursor-chat-persistence.md and optionally update .orchestrate/cursor-chat-persistence/docs/merge-notes.md.
acceptance: docs/cursor-chat-persistence.md exists and is self-contained
All four topic areas integrated without duplication
Safe sync/restore constraints section is actionable
tasks.verify: Open docs/cursor-chat-persistence.md and confirm schemas, join keys, encryption table, and restore constraints are present.

tasks.name: verify-merge-persistence-doc
tasks.scopedGoal: Verify merged docs/cursor-chat-persistence.md satisfies root acceptance criteria and integrates all explore findings.
acceptance: Verdict pass or fail; list any missing sections
